queries.question: Give me the eras for which every costume designer has created costumes.
queries.sql: SELECT Eras.era_name  from Costume_Designers_Eras join Eras on Costume_Designers_Eras.eras_id = Eras.id join Costume_Designers on Costume_Designers_Eras.costume_designer_id = Costume_Designers.id   GROUP BY Costume_Designers_Eras.eras_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Costume_Designers_Eras.costume_designer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Costume_Designers)

queries.question: Give me the eras for which every costume designer has created costumes.
queries.sql: select costume_designers.name , eras.era_name from Costume_Designers_Eras join Eras on Costume_Designers_Eras.eras_id = Eras.id join Costume_Designers on Costume_Designers_Eras.costume_designer_id = Costume_Designers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?era_name WHERE {
  ?costume_designers_eras a :Costume_Designers_Eras .
  ?eras a :Eras .
  ?costume_designers_eras p:hasEras ?eras .
  ?costume_designers a :Costume_Designers .
  ?costume_designers_eras p:hasCostume_Designers ?costume_designers .
  ?costume_designers p:name ?name .
  ?eras p:era_name ?era_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the eras for which every costume designer has created costumes.
